query:
SELECT concurrency_gate_id AS "gate_id!",
               COUNT(*) AS "backlog!",
               MIN(workspace_id) AS "workspace_id!",
               COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours')
                   AS "arrivals_24h!"
        FROM v2_job_queue
        WHERE running = false
          AND concurrency_gate_id IS NOT NULL
          AND canceled_by IS NULL
        GROUP BY concurrency_gate_id
        HAVING MAX(concurrency_gated_at) >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour'
